sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: geonames-sy.zip
rawFiles.notes: GeoNames Syria country dump cached under data-automation outputs.

transforms: Reviewed held GeoNames border-post feature rows against existing canonical border crossings.
Accepted the Nasib PSTB row as an enrichment because its name matches the existing Nasib Border Crossing record and its coordinates are within about 210 meters of the HIU/HDX point.
Added the GeoNames identifier, Arabic facility name, transliteration alias, and dated GeoNames source reference to the existing Nasib record.
Kept At Tanf held because the GeoNames point is about 7.9 kilometers from the existing HIU/HDX crossing point.
Kept the Nasib customs-building CSTM row held because it describes a customs/banking/insurance building rather than a distinct crossing record.
reviewNotes: Enriched 1 existing border crossing record (Nasib) with GeoNames border-post evidence. No new border crossing records were added, and no coordinates were replaced.
